title: Meeting Rooms
problem_statement: Given an array of meeting time intervals, determine if a person can attend all meetings without conflicts.

examples.explanation: Meeting [0,30] overlaps with [5,10], so not all meetings can be attended.

intuition: Sort meetings by start time and check whether any meeting begins before the previous one ends.

approaches.name: Sort and compare
approaches.description: Sort intervals by start time, then verify that each meeting starts after the previous one ends.
approaches.why_not: Checking every pair of meetings is O(n^2) and unnecessary after sorting.

interview_qa.a: Ensure each meeting start time is not before the previous meeting end time.

interview_qa.q: What if there is only one meeting?
interview_qa.a: Then the person can attend it with no conflicts.
